description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ! Product DetailsCase style:  Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments Dial style: Orange dial with metallic hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Orange genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time  Waterproof to 3 BAR, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year SizeCase diameter: 36 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
